title: Shyvv's Trickier Trials
description: Making Trial Chambers near you trickier :)
body:
---
In summary, Trickier Trials makes your Trial Chambers trickier by adding an improved implementation of the Trial Omen effect and adding more reward for your increased risk!

# Features:
### Lances 101:
  Lances are an alternative to the Mace crafted with Dense ingots, which by itself only deal knockback relative to your velocity. Lances have two enchantments which can be applied: Penetration and Jousting. The Lance can also dismount entities from their vehicle, sending them flying in the process!
  
  Penetration has a max level of 5 and deals damage relative to your velocity. (30% additional damage per level)
  
  Jousting has a max level of 3 and deals additional damage while riding an entity. (also 30% additional damage per level)

  Additionally, naming your Lance "Metal Pipe" will deal additional damage audibly.
### Leveled Ominous Trial Keys & Dense Ingots:
  
  Ominous Trial Keys when ejected now have a level which will increase the amount of loot obtained from Vaults.
  
  Instead of Heavy Cores, Dense Ingots will be ejected instead. Dense Ingots are used for crafting Lances, Maces and Charge Chambers, all new weapons which can be obtained from the Trial Chambers.
### Difficulty & Trial Omen Levels:
  When Bad Omen is converted into Trial Omen, the level of Bad Omen only affects the duration of Trial Omen and not the level. Now Trial Omen has levels which will impact the difficulty and amount of loot spawned upon the completion of an Ominous Trial Spawner.
